items.briefing:
Australia's Five Eyes partners have issued a fresh warning that AI-powered cyber threats are expected to intensify in the coming months, meaning organisations like ours should be prepared for more sophisticated phishing and scam attempts. Separately, a local survey found that many Australian football fans routinely share passwords with others — a habit that creates real security risks in any setting, including the workplace.

**Practical tip:** Never share your work passwords with anyone, even people you trust — each person should have their own login credentials.

featured.title: FortiBleed Attackers Turn Firewalls Into Credential Stealers as Heists Persist
featured.quote: Attackers weaponized 430,000 firewalls to steal credentials from Australian enterprises nationwide.
